CVE-2009-4655.name: Novell eDirectory DHOST Predictable Session Cookie
CVE-2009-4655.description:
This module is able to predict the next session cookie value issued
          by the DHOST web service of Novell eDirectory 8.8.5. An attacker can run
          this module, wait until the real administrator logs in, then specify the
          predicted cookie value to hijack their session.
Novell eDirectory 8.8.5 - DHost Weak Session Cookie Session Hijacking (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4655.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-10005.name: ContentKeeper Web Appliance mimencode File Access
CVE-2009-10005.description:
This module abuses the 'mimencode' binary present within
        ContentKeeper Web filtering appliances to retrieve arbitrary
        files outside of the webroot.

CVE-2009-2367.name: Iomega StorCenter Pro NAS Web Authentication Bypass
CVE-2009-2367.description:
The Iomega StorCenter Pro Network Attached Storage device web interface increments sessions IDs,
        allowing for simple brute force attacks to bypass authentication and gain administrative
        access.

CVE-2009-0255.name: TYPO3 sa-2009-001 Weak Encryption Key File Disclosure
CVE-2009-0255.description:
This module exploits a flaw in TYPO3 encryption ey creation process to allow for
        file disclosure in the jumpUrl mechanism. This flaw can be used to read any file
        that the web server user account has access to view.

CVE-2009-0815.name: Typo3 sa-2009-002 File Disclosure
CVE-2009-0815.description:
This module exploits a file disclosure vulnerability in the jumpUrl mechanism of
          Typo3. This flaw can be used to read any file that the web server user account has
          access to.

CVE-2009-1977.name: Oracle Secure Backup Authentication Bypass/Command Injection Vulnerability
CVE-2009-1977.description:
This module exploits an authentication bypass vulnerability
          in login.php in order to execute arbitrary code via a command injection
          vulnerability in property_box.php. This module was tested
          against Oracle Secure Backup version 10.3.0.1.0 (Win32).
Oracle Secure Backup Server 10.3.0.1.0 - Authentication Bypass / Remote Code Injection
CVE-2009-1977.author: ikki

CVE-2009-1978.name: Oracle Secure Backup Authentication Bypass/Command Injection Vulnerability
CVE-2009-1978.description:
This module exploits an authentication bypass vulnerability
          in login.php in order to execute arbitrary code via a command injection
          vulnerability in property_box.php. This module was tested
          against Oracle Secure Backup version 10.3.0.1.0 (Win32).
Oracle Secure Backup Server 10.3.0.1.0 - Authentication Bypass / Remote Code Injection
CVE-2009-1978.author: ikki

CVE-2009-3591.name: Dopewars Denial of Service
CVE-2009-3591.description:
The jet command in Dopewars 1.5.12 is vulnerable to a segmentation fault due to
          a lack of input validation.
Dopewars Server 1.5.12 - 'REQUESTJET' Message Remote Denial of Service
CVE-2009-3591.author: Doug Prostko

CVE-2009-3563.name: NTP.org ntpd Reserved Mode Denial of Service
CVE-2009-3563.description:
This module exploits a denial of service vulnerability
          within the NTP (network time protocol) demon. By sending
          a single packet to a vulnerable ntpd server (Victim A),
          spoofed from the IP address of another vulnerable ntpd server
          (Victim B), both victims will enter an infinite response loop.
          Note, unless you control the spoofed source host or the real
          remote host(s), you will not be able to halt the DoS condition
          once begun!

CVE-2009-1386.name: OpenSSL DTLS ChangeCipherSpec Remote DoS
CVE-2009-1386.description:
This module performs a Denial of Service Attack against Datagram TLS in OpenSSL
          version 0.9.8i and earlier. OpenSSL crashes under these versions when it receives a
          ChangeCipherspec Datagram before a ClientHello.
OpenSSL < 0.9.8i - DTLS ChangeCipherSpec Remote Denial of Service
CVE-2009-1386.author: Jon Oberheide

CVE-2009-2514.name: Microsoft Windows EOT Font Table Directory Integer Overflow
CVE-2009-2514.description:
This module exploits an integer overflow flaw in the Microsoft Windows Embedded
          OpenType font parsing code located in win32k.sys. Since the kernel itself parses
          embedded web fonts, it is possible to trigger a BSoD from a normal web page when
          viewed with Internet Explorer.
Microsoft Windows Server 2000 < 2008 - Embedded OpenType Font Engine Remote Code Execution (MS09-065) (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2514.author: H D Moore

CVE-2009-2521.name: Microsoft IIS FTP Server LIST Stack Exhaustion
CVE-2009-2521.description:
This module triggers Denial of Service condition in the Microsoft Internet
          Information Services (IIS) FTP Server 5.0 through 7.0 via a list (ls) -R command
          containing a wildcard. For this exploit to work in most cases, you need 1) a valid
          ftp account: either read-only or write-access account 2) the "FTP Publishing" must
          be configured as "manual" mode in startup type 3) there must be at least one
          directory under FTP root directory. If your provided an FTP account has write-access
          privilege and there is no single directory, a new directory with random name will be
          created prior to sending exploit payload.
Microsoft IIS 5.0/6.0 FTP Server - Stack Exhaustion Denial of Service
CVE-2009-2521.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-2521.description: Microsoft IIS 7.0 FTP Server - Stack Exhaustion Denial of Service (MS09-053) (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2521.author: Myo Soe

CVE-2009-3103.name: Microsoft SRV2.SYS SMB Negotiate ProcessID Function Table Dereference
CVE-2009-3103.description:
This module exploits an out of bounds function table dereference in the SMB
          request validation code of the SRV2.SYS driver included with Windows Vista, Windows 7
          release candidates (not RTM), and Windows 2008 Server prior to R2.  Windows	Vista
          without SP1 does not seem affected by this flaw.

CVE-2009-3103.name: Microsoft SRV2.SYS SMB2 Logoff Remote Kernel NULL Pointer Dereference
CVE-2009-3103.description:
This module triggers a NULL pointer dereference in the SRV2.SYS kernel driver when processing
          an SMB2 logoff request before a session has been correctly negotiated, resulting in a BSOD.
          Affecting Vista SP1/SP2 (and possibly Server 2008 SP1/SP2), the flaw was resolved with MS09-050.

CVE-2009-3103.name: MS09-050 Microsoft SRV2.SYS SMB Negotiate ProcessID Function Table Dereference
CVE-2009-3103.description:
This module exploits an out of bounds function table dereference in the SMB
          request validation code of the SRV2.SYS driver included with Windows Vista, Windows 7
          release candidates (not RTM), and Windows 2008 Server prior to R2. Windows Vista
          without SP1 does not seem affected by this flaw.
Microsoft Windows - SMB2 Negotiate Protocol '0x72' Response Denial of Service
CVE-2009-3103.author: Jelmer de Hen

CVE-2009-3103.description: Microsoft Windows 7/2008 R2 - Remote Kernel Crash
CVE-2009-3103.author: laurent gaffie

CVE-2009-3103.description: Microsoft Windows Vista/7 - SMB2.0 Negotiate Protocol Request Remote Blue Screen of Death (MS07-063)
CVE-2009-3103.author: laurent gaffie

CVE-2009-3103.description: Microsoft Windows - 'srv2.sys' SMB Negotiate ProcessID Function Table Dereference (MS09-050)
CVE-2009-3103.author: Piotr Bania

CVE-2009-3103.description: Microsoft Windows - 'srv2.sys' SMB Negotiate ProcessID Function Table Dereference (MS09-050) (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3103.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-0836.name: Foxit Reader Authorization Bypass
CVE-2009-0836.description:
This module exploits an authorization bypass vulnerability in Foxit Reader
          build 1120. When an attacker creates a specially crafted pdf file containing
          an Open/Execute action, arbitrary commands can be executed without confirmation
          from the victim.

CVE-2009-3960.name: Adobe XML External Entity Injection
CVE-2009-3960.description:
Multiple Adobe Products -- XML External Entity Injection. Affected Software: BlazeDS 3.2 and
        earlier versions, LiveCycle 9.0, 8.2.1, and 8.0.1, LiveCycle Data Services 3.0, 2.6.1, and
        2.5.1, Flex Data Services 2.0.1, ColdFusion 9.0, 8.0.1, 8.0, and 7.0.2
Adobe (Multiple Products) - XML External Entity / XML Injection
CVE-2009-3960.author: Roberto Suggi Liverani

CVE-2009-3960.description: Adobe (Multiple Products) - XML Injection File Content Disclosure
CVE-2009-3960.author: Tess Sluyter

CVE-2009-1535.name: MS09-020 IIS6 WebDAV Unicode Auth Bypass Directory Scanner
CVE-2009-1535.description:
This module is based on et's HTTP Directory Scanner module,
          with one exception. Where authentication is required, it attempts
          to bypass authentication using the WebDAV IIS6 Unicode vulnerability
          discovered by Kingcope. The vulnerability appears to be exploitable
          where WebDAV is enabled on the IIS6 server, and any protected folder
          requires either Basic, Digest or NTLM authentication.

CVE-2009-1535.name: MS09-020 IIS6 WebDAV Unicode Authentication Bypass
CVE-2009-1535.description:
This module attempts to to bypass authentication using the WebDAV IIS6
          Unicode vulnerability discovered by Kingcope. The vulnerability appears
          to be exploitable where WebDAV is enabled on the IIS6 server, and any
          protected folder requires either Basic, Digest or NTLM authentication.
Microsoft IIS 6.0 - WebDAV Remote Authentication Bypass (1)
CVE-2009-1535.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-1535.description: Microsoft IIS 6.0 - WebDAV Remote Authentication Bypass (2)
CVE-2009-1535.author: ka0x

CVE-2009-1122.name: MS09-020 IIS6 WebDAV Unicode Auth Bypass Directory Scanner
CVE-2009-1122.description:
This module is based on et's HTTP Directory Scanner module,
          with one exception. Where authentication is required, it attempts
          to bypass authentication using the WebDAV IIS6 Unicode vulnerability
          discovered by Kingcope. The vulnerability appears to be exploitable
          where WebDAV is enabled on the IIS6 server, and any protected folder
          requires either Basic, Digest or NTLM authentication.

CVE-2009-1122.name: MS09-020 IIS6 WebDAV Unicode Authentication Bypass
CVE-2009-1122.description:
This module attempts to to bypass authentication using the WebDAV IIS6
          Unicode vulnerability discovered by Kingcope. The vulnerability appears
          to be exploitable where WebDAV is enabled on the IIS6 server, and any
          protected folder requires either Basic, Digest or NTLM authentication.
Microsoft IIS 6.0 - WebDAV Remote Authentication Bypass (2)
CVE-2009-1122.author: ka0x

CVE-2009-0580.name: Apache Tomcat User Enumeration
CVE-2009-0580.description:
This module enumerates Apache Tomcat's usernames via malformed requests to
        j_security_check, which can be found in the web administration package. It should
        work against Tomcat servers 4.1.0 - 4.1.39, 5.5.0 - 5.5.27, and 6.0.0 - 6.0.18.
        Newer versions no longer have the "admin" package by default. The 'admin' package
        is no longer provided for Tomcat 6 and later versions.
Apache Tomcat 6.0.18 - Form Authentication Existing/Non-Existing 'Username' Enumeration
CVE-2009-0580.author: D. Matscheko

CVE-2009-3843.name: Tomcat Application Manager Login Utility
CVE-2009-3843.description: This module simply attempts to login to a Tomcat Application Manager instance using a specific user/pass.

CVE-2009-3843.name: Apache Tomcat Manager Application Deployer Authenticated Code Execution
CVE-2009-3843.description:
This module can be used to execute a payload on Apache Tomcat servers that
          have an exposed "manager" application. The payload is uploaded as a WAR archive
          containing a jsp application using a PUT request.

          The manager application can also be abused using /manager/html/upload, but that
          method is not implemented in this module.

          NOTE: The compatible payload sets vary based on the selected target. For
          example, you must select the Windows target to use native Windows payloads.

CVE-2009-3843.name: Apache Tomcat Manager Authenticated Upload Code Execution
CVE-2009-3843.description:
This module can be used to execute a payload on Apache Tomcat servers that
          have an exposed "manager" application. The payload is uploaded as a WAR archive
          containing a jsp application using a POST request against the /manager/html/upload
          component.

          NOTE: The compatible payload sets vary based on the selected target. For
          example, you must select the Windows target to use native Windows payloads.
Apache Tomcat Manager - Application Deployer (Authenticated) Code Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3843.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4189.description: This module simply attempts to login to a Tomcat Application Manager instance using a specific user/pass.

CVE-2009-2335.name: WordPress Brute Force and User Enumeration Utility
CVE-2009-2335.description: WordPress Authentication Brute Force and User Enumeration Utility

CVE-2009-1730.name: NetDecision 4.2 TFTP Directory Traversal
CVE-2009-1730.description:
This modules exploits a directory traversal vulnerability in NetDecision 4.2
          TFTP service.

CVE-2009-1730.name: NetDecision 4.2 TFTP Writable Directory Traversal Execution
CVE-2009-1730.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability found in NetDecision 4.2 TFTP server. The
          software contains a directory traversal vulnerability that allows a remote attacker
          to write arbitrary file to the file system, which results in code  execution under
          the context of user executing the TFTP Server.
NetDecision 4.2 - TFTP Writable Directory Traversal Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1730.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2936.name: Varnish Cache CLI File Read
CVE-2009-2936.description:
This module attempts to read the first line of a file by abusing the error message when
                           compiling a file with vcl.load.

CVE-2009-2936.name: Varnish Cache CLI Login Utility
CVE-2009-2936.description:
This module attempts to login to the Varnish Cache (varnishd) CLI instance using a bruteforce
                           list of passwords.
Varnish Cache CLI Interface - Remote Code Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2936.author: Patrick Webster

CVE-2009-3733.name: VMware Server Directory Traversal Vulnerability
CVE-2009-3733.description:
This modules exploits the VMware Server Directory Traversal
        vulnerability in VMware Server 1.x before 1.0.10 build 203137 and 2.x before
        2.0.2 build 203138 on Linux, VMware ESXi 3.5, and VMware ESX 3.0.3 and 3.5
        allows remote attackers to read arbitrary files. Common VMware server ports
        80/8222 and 443/8333 SSL.  If you want to download the entire VM, check out
        the gueststealer tool.
VMware Server 2.0.1 / ESXi Server 3.5 - Directory Traversal
CVE-2009-3733.author: Justin Morehouse

CVE-2009-0978.name: Oracle DB SQL Injection via SYS.LT.ROLLBACKWORKSPACE
CVE-2009-0978.description:
This module exploits a sql injection flaw in the ROLLBACKWORKSPACE
          procedure of the PL/SQL package SYS.LT. Any user with execute
          privilege on the vulnerable package can exploit this vulnerability.

CVE-2009-3699.name: AIX Calendar Manager Service Daemon (rpc.cmsd) Opcode 21 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3699.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow vulnerability in opcode 21 handled by
          rpc.cmsd on AIX. By making a request with a long string passed to the first
          argument of the "rtable_create" RPC, a stack based buffer overflow occurs. This
          leads to arbitrary code execution.

          NOTE: Unsuccessful attempts may cause inetd/portmapper to enter a state where
          further attempts are not possible.
AIX Calendar Manager Service Daemon (rpc.cmsd) Opcode 21 - Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3699.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2727.name: ToolTalk rpc.ttdbserverd _tt_internal_realpath Buffer Overflow (AIX)
CVE-2009-2727.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow vulnerability in _tt_internal_realpath
          function of the ToolTalk database server (rpc.ttdbserverd).

CVE-2009-4146.name: FreeBSD rtld execl() Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-4146.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the FreeBSD
          run-time link-editor (rtld).

          The rtld `unsetenv()` function fails to remove `LD_*`
          environment variables if `__findenv()` fails.

          This can be abused to load arbitrary shared objects using
          `LD_PRELOAD`, resulting in privileged code execution.

          This module has been tested successfully on:

          FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE (amd64); and
          FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE (amd64).
FreeBSD 8.0 Run-Time Link-Editor (RTLD) - Local Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-4146.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-4147.name: FreeBSD rtld execl() Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-4147.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the FreeBSD
          run-time link-editor (rtld).

          The rtld `unsetenv()` function fails to remove `LD_*`
          environment variables if `__findenv()` fails.

          This can be abused to load arbitrary shared objects using
          `LD_PRELOAD`, resulting in privileged code execution.

          This module has been tested successfully on:

          FreeBSD 7.2-RELEASE (amd64); and
          FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE (amd64).
FreeBSD 8.0 Run-Time Link-Editor (RTLD) - Local Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-4147.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-2765.name: DD-WRT HTTP Daemon Arbitrary Command Execution
CVE-2009-2765.description:
This module abuses a metacharacter injection vulnerability in the
          HTTP management server of wireless gateways running DD-WRT. This flaw
          allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands as
          the root user account.
DD-WRT HTTPd Daemon/Service - Arbitrary Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2765.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2765.description: DD-WRT HTTPd Daemon/Service - Remote Command Execution
CVE-2009-2765.author: gat3way

CVE-2009-2692.name: Linux Kernel Sendpage Local Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-2692.description:
The Linux kernel failed to properly initialize some entries in the
          proto_ops struct for several protocols, leading to NULL being
          dereferenced and used as a function pointer. By using mmap(2) to map
          page 0, an attacker can execute arbitrary code in the context of the
          kernel.

          Several public exploits exist for this vulnerability, including
          spender's wunderbar_emporium and rcvalle's ppc port, sock_sendpage.c.

          All Linux 2.4/2.6 versions since May 2001 are believed to be affected:
          2.4.4 up to and including 2.4.37.4; 2.6.0 up to and including 2.6.30.4

          This module has been tested successfully on CentOS 5.0 (i386) with
          kernel version 2.6.18-8.1.1.tl5; and Debian 3.1r8 Sarge (i686) with
          kernel version 2.4.27-3-386.
Linux Kernel 2.4.x/2.6.x (CentOS 4.8/5.3 / RHEL 4.8/5.3 / SuSE 10 SP2/11 / Ubuntu 8.10) (PPC) - 'sock_sendpage()' Local Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-2692.author: Ramon de C Valle

CVE-2009-2692.description: Linux Kernel 2.4/2.6 (RedHat Linux 9 / Fedora Core 4 < 11 / Whitebox 4 / CentOS 4) - 'sock_sendpage()' Ring0 Privilege Escalation (5)
CVE-2009-2692.author: INetCop Security

CVE-2009-1185.name: Linux udev Netlink Local Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-1185.description:
Versions of udev < 1.4.1 do not verify that netlink messages are
            coming from the kernel. This allows local users to gain privileges by
            sending netlink messages from userland.
Linux Kernel 2.6 (Debian 4.0 / Ubuntu / Gentoo) UDEV < 1.4.1 - Local Privilege Escalation (1)
CVE-2009-1185.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-1185.description: Linux Kernel 2.6 (Gentoo / Ubuntu 8.10/9.04) UDEV < 1.4.1 - Local Privilege Escalation (2)
CVE-2009-1185.author: Jon Oberheide

CVE-2009-1185.description: Linux Kernel UDEV < 1.4.1 - 'Netlink' Local Privilege Escalation (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1185.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4498.name: Zabbix Server Arbitrary Command Execution
CVE-2009-4498.description:
This module abuses the "Command" trap in Zabbix Server to execute arbitrary
          commands without authentication. By default the Node ID "0" is used, if it doesn't
          work, the Node ID is leaked from the error message and exploitation retried.

          According to the vendor versions prior to 1.6.9 are vulnerable. The vulnerability
          has been successfully tested on Zabbix Server 1.6.7 on Ubuntu 10.04.

CVE-2009-4484.name: MySQL yaSSL CertDecoder::GetName Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4484.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the yaSSL (1.9.8 and earlier)
          implementation bundled with MySQL. By sending a specially crafted
          client certificate, an attacker can execute arbitrary code.

          This vulnerability is present within the CertDecoder::GetName function inside
          "taocrypt/src/asn.cpp". However, the stack buffer that is written to exists
          within a parent function's stack frame.

          NOTE: This vulnerability requires a non-default configuration. First, the attacker
          must be able to pass the host-based authentication. Next, the server must be
          configured to listen on an accessible network interface.  Lastly, the server
          must have been manually configured to use SSL.

          The binary from version 5.5.0-m2 was built with /GS and /SafeSEH. During testing
          on Windows XP SP3, these protections successfully prevented exploitation.

          Testing was also done with mysql on Ubuntu 9.04. Although the vulnerable code is
          present, both version 5.5.0-m2 built from source and version 5.0.75 from a binary
          package were not exploitable due to the use of the compiler's FORTIFY feature.

          Although suse11 was mentioned in the original blog post, the binary package they
          provide does not contain yaSSL or support SSL.

CVE-2009-2477.name: Firefox 3.5 escape() Return Value Memory Corruption
CVE-2009-2477.description:
This module exploits a memory corruption vulnerability in the Mozilla
          Firefox browser. This flaw occurs when a bug in the javascript interpreter
          fails to preserve the return value of the escape() function and results in
          uninitialized memory being used instead. This module has only been tested
          on Windows, but should work on other platforms as well with the current
          targets.
Naenara Browser 3.5 (RedStar 3.0 Desktop) - 'JACKRABBIT' Client-Side Command Execution
CVE-2009-2477.author: Hacker Fantastic

CVE-2009-2477.description: Mozilla Firefox 3.5 - 'escape()' Return Value Memory Corruption (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2477.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2477.description: Mozilla Firefox 3.5 - Font tags Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2477.author: Sberry

CVE-2009-0950.name: Apple OS X iTunes 8.1.1 ITMS Overflow
CVE-2009-0950.description:
This modules exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in iTunes
          itms:// URL parsing.  It is accessible from the browser and
          in Safari, itms urls will be opened in iTunes automatically.
          Because iTunes is multithreaded, only vfork-based payloads should
          be used.
Apple iTunes 8.1.1 - 'ITMS' Multiple Protocol Handler Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0950.author: Will Drewry

CVE-2009-3867.name: Sun Java JRE getSoundbank file:// URI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3867.description:
This module exploits a flaw in the getSoundbank function in the Sun JVM.

          The payload is serialized and passed to the applet via PARAM tags. It must be
          a native payload.

          The effected Java versions are JDK and JRE 6 Update 16 and earlier,
          JDK and JRE 5.0 Update 21 and earlier, SDK and JRE 1.4.2_23 and
          earlier, and SDK and JRE 1.3.1_26 and earlier.

          NOTE: Although all of the above versions are reportedly vulnerable, only

CVE-2009-3869.description:
This module exploits a flaw in the setDiffICM function in the Sun JVM.

          The payload is serialized and passed to the applet via PARAM tags. It must be
          a native payload.

          The effected Java versions are JDK and JRE 6 Update 16 and earlier,
          JDK and JRE 5.0 Update 21 and earlier, SDK and JRE 1.4.2_23 and
          earlier, and SDK and JRE 1.3.1_26 and earlier.

          NOTE: Although all of the above versions are reportedly vulnerable, only
          1.6.0_u11 and 1.6.0_u16 on Windows XP SP3 were tested.

CVE-2009-2990.name: Adobe U3D CLODProgressiveMeshDeclaration Array Overrun
CVE-2009-2990.description:
This module exploits an array overflow in Adobe Reader and Adobe Acrobat.
          Affected versions include < 7.1.4, < 8.1.7, and < 9.2. By creating a
          specially crafted pdf that a contains malformed U3D data, an attacker may
          be able to execute arbitrary code.
Adobe Reader / Acrobat - '.U3D' File Invalid Array Index Overflow
CVE-2009-2990.author: Felipe Andres Manzano

CVE-2009-2261.name: PeaZip Zip Processing Command Injection
CVE-2009-2261.description:
This module exploits a command injection vulnerability in PeaZip. All
          versions prior to 2.6.2 are suspected vulnerable. Testing was conducted with
          version 2.6.1 on Windows.

          In order for the command to be executed, an attacker must convince someone to
          open a specially crafted zip file with PeaZip, and access the specially file via
          double-clicking it. By doing so, an attacker can execute arbitrary commands
          as the victim user.

CVE-2009-0695.name: Wyse Rapport Hagent Fake Hserver Command Execution
CVE-2009-0695.description:
This module exploits the Wyse Rapport Hagent service by pretending to
          be a legitimate server. This process involves starting both HTTP and
          FTP services on the attacker side, then contacting the Hagent service of
          the target and indicating that an update is available. The target will
          then download the payload wrapped in an executable from the FTP service.
Wyse - Machine Remote Power Off (Denial of Service) (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0695.author: it.solunium

CVE-2009-0695.description: Wyse Rapport Hagent Fake Hserver - Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0695.author: kf

CVE-2009-10006.name: UFO: Alien Invasion IRC Client Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-10006.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the IRC client component
          of UFO: Alien Invasion 2.2.1.

CVE-2009-10006.name: UFO: Alien Invasion IRC Client Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-10006.description:

CVE-2009-20011.name: ContentKeeper Web Remote Command Execution
CVE-2009-20011.description:
This module exploits the ContentKeeper Web Appliance. Versions prior
          to 125.10 are affected. This module exploits a combination of weaknesses
          to enable remote command execution as the Apache user. By setting
          SkipEscalation to false, this module will attempt to setuid the bash shell.

CVE-2009-4502.name: Zabbix Agent net.tcp.listen Command Injection
CVE-2009-4502.description:
This module exploits a metacharacter injection vulnerability
          in the FreeBSD and Solaris versions of the Zabbix agent. This flaw
          can only be exploited if the attacker can hijack the IP address
          of an authorized server (as defined in the configuration file).

CVE-2009-20010.name: Dogfood CRM spell.php Remote Command Execution
CVE-2009-20010.description:
This module exploits a previously unpublished vulnerability in the
          Dogfood CRM mail function which is vulnerable to command injection
          in the spell check feature.  Because of character restrictions, this
          exploit works best with the double-reverse telnet payload. This
          vulnerability was discovered by LSO and affects v2.0.10.

CVE-2009-2288.name: Nagios3 statuswml.cgi Ping Command Execution
CVE-2009-2288.description:
This module abuses a metacharacter injection vulnerability in the
          Nagios3 statuswml.cgi script. This flaw is triggered when shell
          metacharacters are present in the parameters to the ping and
          traceroute commands.

CVE-2009-4140.name: Open Flash Chart v2 Arbitrary File Upload
CVE-2009-4140.description:
This module exploits a file upload vulnerability found in Open Flash
          Chart version 2. Attackers can abuse the 'ofc_upload_image.php' file
          in order to upload and execute malicious PHP files.

CVE-2009-4140.name: OpenEMR PHP File Upload Vulnerability
CVE-2009-4140.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability found in OpenEMR 4.1.1 By abusing the
          ofc_upload_image.php file from the openflashchart library, a malicious user can
          upload a file to the tmp-upload-images directory without any authentication, which
          results in arbitrary code execution. The module has been tested successfully on
          OpenEMR 4.1.1 over Ubuntu 10.04.
Open Flash Chart 2 - Arbitrary File Upload (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4140.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4140.description: Joomla! Component com_civicrm 4.2.2 - Remote Code Injection

CVE-2009-4098.name: OpenX banner-edit.php File Upload PHP Code Execution
CVE-2009-4098.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the OpenX advertising software.
          In versions prior to version 2.8.2, authenticated users can upload files
          with arbitrary extensions to be used as banner creative content. By uploading
          a file with a PHP extension, an attacker can execute arbitrary PHP code.

          NOTE: The file must also return either "png", "gif", or "jpeg" as its image
          type as returned from the PHP getimagesize() function.
OpenX - 'banner-edit.php' Arbitrary File Upload / PHP Code Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4098.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-20006.name: osCommerce 2.2 Arbitrary PHP Code Execution
CVE-2009-20006.description:
osCommerce is a popular open source E-Commerce application.
          The admin console contains a file management utility that
          allows administrators to upload, download, and edit files.
          This could be abused to allow unauthenticated attackers to
          execute arbitrary code with the permissions of the
          webserver.

CVE-2009-1151.name: PhpMyAdmin Config File Code Injection
CVE-2009-1151.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in phpMyAdmin's setup
          feature which allows an attacker to inject arbitrary PHP
          code into a configuration file. The original advisory says
          the vulnerability is present in phpMyAdmin versions 2.11.x
          < 2.11.9.5 and 3.x < 3.1.3.1; this module was tested on
          3.0.1.1.

          The file where our payload is written
          (phpMyAdmin/config/config.inc.php) is not directly used by
          the system, so it may be a good idea to either delete it or
          copy the running config (phpMyAdmin/config.inc.php) over it
          after successful exploitation.
phpMyAdmin - 'pmaPWN!' Code Injection / Remote Code Execution
CVE-2009-1151.author: Hacking Expose!

info.Name: PhpMyAdmin Scripts - Remote Code Execution
info.Description: PhpMyAdmin Scripts 2.11.x before 2.11.9.5 and 3.x before 3.1.3.1 are susceptible to a remote code execution in setup.php that allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary PHP code into a configuration file via the save action. Combined with the ability to save files on server, this can allow unauthenticated users to execute arbitrary PHP code.

CVE-2009-0545.name: ZeroShell Remote Code Execution
CVE-2009-0545.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability found in ZeroShell 2.0 RC2 and lower.
          It will leverage an unauthenticated local file inclusion vulnerability in the
          "/cgi-bin/kerbynet" url. The file retrieved is "/var/register/system/ldap/rootpw".
          This file contains the admin password in cleartext. The password is used to login
          as the admin user. After the authentication process is complete it will use the
          RunScript action to execute the payload with root privileges.

info.Name: ZeroShell <= 1.0beta11 Remote Code Execution
info.Description: ZeroShell 1.0beta11 and earlier via cgi-bin/kerbynet allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands through shell metacharacters in the type parameter in a NoAuthREQ x509List action.

CVE-2009-1429.name: Symantec System Center Alert Management System (xfr.exe) Arbitrary Command Execution
CVE-2009-1429.description:
Symantec System Center Alert Management System is prone to a remote command-injection vulnerability
          because the application fails to properly sanitize user-supplied input.
Symantec (Multiple Products) - Intel Common Base Agent Remote Command Execution

          Winds3D Player from AwingSoft. The Winds3D Player is a browser plugin for

          an overly long string to the method "OnBeforeVideoDownload" an attacker can execute
          arbitrary code.
BaoFeng Storm - 'mps.dll' ActiveX OnBeforeVideoDownload Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1612.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2011.name: Worldweaver DX Studio Player shell.execute() Command Execution
CVE-2009-2011.description:
This module exploits a command execution vulnerability within the DX
          Studio Player from Worldweaver for versions 3.0.29 and earlier. The
          player is a browser plugin for IE (ActiveX) and Firefox (dll). When an
          unsuspecting user visits a web page referring to a specially crafted
          .dxstudio document, an attacker can execute arbitrary commands.

          Testing was conducted using plugin version 3.0.29.0 for Firefox 2.0.0.20
          and IE 6 on Windows XP SP3. In IE, the user will be prompted if they
          wish to allow the plug-in to access local files. This prompt appears to
          occur only once per server host.

          NOTE: This exploit uses additionally dangerous script features to write
          to local files!
Worldweaver DX Studio Player 3.0.29 - 'shell.execute()' Command Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2011.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-20008.name: Green Dam URL Processing Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20008.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in Green Dam Youth Escort
          version 3.17 in the way it handles overly long URLs.
          By setting an overly long URL, an attacker can overrun a buffer and execute
          arbitrary code. This module uses the .NET DLL memory technique by Alexander
          Sotirov and Mark Dowd and should bypass DEP, NX and ASLR.

This module exploits a directory traversal in Persits Software Inc's
          XUpload ActiveX control(version 3.0.0.3) that's included in HP LoadRunner 9.5.

CA eTrust PestPatrol - ActiveX Control Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4225.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-1028.name: eZip Wizard 3.0 Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1028.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in
          version 3.0 of ediSys Corp.'s eZip Wizard.

          In order for the command to be executed, an attacker must convince someone to
          open a specially crafted zip file with eZip Wizard, and access the specially
          file via double-clicking it. By doing so, an attacker can execute arbitrary
          code as the victim user.
eZip Wizard 3.0 - Local Stack Buffer Overflow (PoC) (SEH)
CVE-2009-1028.author: fl0 fl0w

CVE-2009-1028.description: eZip Wizard 3.0 - Local Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1028.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4962.name: Fat Player Media Player 0.6b0 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4962.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in Fat Player 0.6b. When
          the application is used to import a specially crafted wav file, a buffer overflow occurs
          allowing arbitrary code execution.
Fat Player 0.6b - '.WAV' File Processing Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-4962.author: Praveen Darshanam

CVE-2009-0184.name: Free Download Manager Torrent Parsing Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0184.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Free Download Manager
          3.0 Build 844. Arbitrary code execution could occur when parsing a
          specially crafted torrent file.
Free Download Manager - '.Torrent' File Parsing Multiple Buffer Overflow Vulnerabilities (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0184.author: Carsten Eiram

CVE-2009-0184.description: Free Download Manager 3.0 Build 844 - Torrent Parsing Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0184.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-0546.name: FeedDemon Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0546.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in FeedDemon v3.1.0.12. When the application
          is used to import a specially crafted opml file, a buffer overflow occurs allowing
          arbitrary code execution.

          All versions are suspected to be vulnerable. This vulnerability was originally reported
          against version 2.7 in February of 2009.
feedDemon 2.7 - OPML Outline Tag Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0546.author: cenjan

CVE-2009-0837.name: Foxit Reader 3.0 Open Execute Action Stack Based Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0837.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in Foxit Reader 3.0 builds 1301 and earlier.
          Due to the way Foxit Reader handles the input from an "Launch" action, it is possible
          to cause a stack-based buffer overflow, allowing an attacker to gain arbitrary code
          execution under the context of the user.
Foxit Reader 3.0 (Build 1301) - PDF Universal Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0837.author: SkD

CVE-2009-0837.description: Foxit Reader 3.0 - Open Execute Action Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0837.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-20004.name: gAlan 0.2.1 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20004.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in gAlan 0.2.1
          by creating a specially crafted galan file.

CVE-2009-0133.name: HTML Help Workshop 4.74 (hhp Project File) Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0133.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HTML Help Workshop 4.74
          by creating a specially crafted hhp file.
Microsoft HTML Help Workshop - '.hhp' Denial of Service
CVE-2009-0133.author: darkeagle

CVE-2009-0133.description: Microsoft HTML Help Workshop - '.hhp' Local Buffer Overflow (1)

CVE-2009-0133.author: Encrypt3d.M!nd

CVE-2009-0133.description: Microsoft HTML Workshop 4.74 - Universal Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0133.author: SkD

CVE-2009-2485.name: HT-MP3Player 1.0 HT3 File Parsing Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2485.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HT-MP3Player 1.0.
          Arbitrary code execution could occur when parsing a specially crafted
          .HT3 file.

          NOTE: The player installation does not register the file type to be
          handled. Therefore, a user must take extra steps to load this file.

CVE-2009-4265.name: PointDev IDEAL Migration Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4265.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in versions v9.7
          through v10.5 of IDEAL Administration and versions 4.5 and 4.51 of
          IDEAL Migration. All versions are suspected to be vulnerable.
          By creating a specially crafted ipj file, an attacker may be able
          to execute arbitrary code.

          NOTE: IDEAL Administration 10.5 is compiled with /SafeSEH
PointDev IDEAL Administration 2009 9.7 - Local Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4265.author: Dr_IDE

CVE-2009-4265.description: PointDev IDEAL Administration 2009 9.7 - Local Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4265.author: dookie

CVE-2009-2650.name: Media Jukebox 8.0.400 Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-2650.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Media Jukebox 8.0.400
          by creating a specially crafted m3u or pls file.

CVE-2009-20002.name: Millenium MP3 Studio 2.0 (PLS File) Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20002.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in Millenium MP3 Studio 2.0.
          An attacker must send the file to victim and the victim must open the file.
          Alternatively it may be possible to execute code remotely via an embedded
          PLS file within a browser, when the PLS extension is registered to Millenium MP3 Studio.
          This functionality has not been tested in this module.

CVE-2009-3129.name: MS09-067 Microsoft Excel Malformed FEATHEADER Record Vulnerability
CVE-2009-3129.description:
This module exploits a vulnerability in the handling of the FEATHEADER record
          by Microsoft Excel. Revisions of Office XP and later prior to the release of the
          MS09-067 bulletin are vulnerable.

          When processing a FEATHEADER (Shared Feature) record, Microsoft used a data
          structure from the file to calculate a pointer offset without doing proper
          validation. Attacker supplied data is then used to calculate the location of an
          object, and in turn a virtual function call. This results in arbitrary code
          execution.

          NOTE: On some versions of Office, the user will need to dismiss a warning dialog
          prior to the payload executing.

CVE-2009-3214.name: ProShow Gold v4.0.2549 (PSH File) Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3214.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in ProShow Gold v4.0.2549.
          An attacker must send the file to victim and the victim must open the file.
Photodex ProShow Gold 4 (Windows XP SP3) - '.psh' Universal Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-3214.author: corelanc0d3r

CVE-2009-3214.description: ProShow Gold 4.0.2549 - '.psh' Local Stack Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3214.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-3214.description: ProShow Producer / Gold 4.0.2549 - '.psh' Universal Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-3214.author: hack4love

CVE-2009-3861.name: SafeNet SoftRemote GROUPNAME Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3861.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in SafeNet SoftRemote
          Security Policy Editor <= 10.8.5. When an attacker
          creates a specially formatted security policy with an
          overly long GROUPNAME argument, it is possible to execute
          arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-1641.name: Shadow Stream Recorder 3.0.1.7 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1641.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in Shadow Stream Recorder 3.0.1.7.
          Using the application to open a specially crafted asx file, a buffer
          overflow may occur to allow arbitrary code execution under the context
          of the user.

CVE-2009-2566.name: TFM MMPlayer (m3u/ppl File) Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2566.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in MMPlayer 2.2
          The vulnerability is triggered when opening a malformed M3U/PPL file
          that contains an overly long string, which results in overwriting a
          SEH record, thus allowing arbitrary code execution under the context
          of the user.

CVE-2009-0261.name: Total Video Player 1.3.1 (Settings.ini) - SEH Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0261.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in Total Video Player 1.3.1. The vulnerability
          occurs opening malformed Settings.ini file e.g. "C:\Program Files\Total Video Player\".
          This module has been tested successfully on Windows WinXp-Sp3-EN, Windows 7, and Windows 8.
Total Video Player 1.31 - 'DefaultSkin.ini' Local Stack Overflow
CVE-2009-0261.author: His0k4

CVE-2009-1260.name: UltraISO CCD File Parsing Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1260.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in EZB Systems, Inc's
          UltraISO. When processing .CCD files, data is read from file into a
          fixed-size stack buffer. Since no bounds checking is done, a buffer overflow
          can occur. Attackers can execute arbitrary code by convincing their victim
          to open an CCD file.

          NOTE: A file with the same base name, but the extension of "img" must also
          exist. Opening either file will trigger the vulnerability, but the files must
          both exist.

CVE-2009-2484.name: VideoLAN Client (VLC) Win32 smb:// URI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2484.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in the Win32AddConnection
          function of the VideoLAN VLC media player. Versions 0.9.9 through 1.0.1 are
          reportedly affected.

          This vulnerability is only present in Win32 builds of VLC.

          This payload was found to work with the windows/exec and
          windows/meterpreter/reverse_tcp payloads. However, the
          windows/meterpreter/reverse_ord_tcp was found not to work.
VideoLAN VLC Media Player 0.9.9 - 'smb://' URI Stack Buffer Overflow (PoC)
CVE-2009-2484.author: Trancer

CVE-2009-2484.description: VideoLAN VLC Client (Windows x86) - 'smb://' URI Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2484.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-0182.name: VUPlayer CUE Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0182.description:
This module exploits a stack based overflow in VUPlayer <= 2.49. When
          the application is used to open a specially crafted cue file, a buffer is overwritten allowing
          for the execution of arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-1831.name: Winamp MAKI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1831.description:
This module exploits a stack based buffer overflow in Winamp 5.55. The flaw
          exists in the gen_ff.dll and occurs while parsing a specially crafted MAKI file,
          where memmove is used in an insecure way with user controlled data.

          To exploit the vulnerability the attacker must convince the victim to install the
          generated mcvcore.maki file in the "scripts" directory of the default "Bento" skin,
          or generate a new skin using the crafted mcvcore.maki file. The module has been
          tested successfully on Windows XP SP3 and Windows 7 SP1.
Winamp 5.55 - MAKI script Universal Integer Overflow
CVE-2009-1831.author: Encrypt3d.M!nd

CVE-2009-20003.name: Xenorate 2.50 (.xpl) Universal Local Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-20003.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Xenorate 2.50
          by creating a specially crafted xpl file.

CVE-2009-1675.name: 32bit FTP Client Stack Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1675.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in 32bit ftp client, triggered when trying to
          download a file that has an overly long filename.

CVE-2009-4769.name: HTTPDX tolog() Function Format String Vulnerability
CVE-2009-4769.description:
This module exploits a format string vulnerability in HTTPDX FTP server.
          By sending a specially crafted FTP command containing format specifiers, an
          attacker can corrupt memory and execute arbitrary code.

          By default logging is off for HTTP, but enabled for the 'moderator' user
          via FTP.

CVE-2009-4769.name: HTTPDX tolog() Function Format String Vulnerability
CVE-2009-4769.description:
This module exploits a format string vulnerability in HTTPDX HTTP server.
          By sending a specially crafted HTTP request containing format specifiers, an
          attacker can corrupt memory and execute arbitrary code.

          By default logging is off for HTTP, but enabled for the 'moderator' user
          via FTP.

CVE-2009-3023.name: MS09-053 Microsoft IIS FTP Server NLST Response Overflow
CVE-2009-3023.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow flaw in the Microsoft IIS FTP
          service. The flaw is triggered when a special NLST argument is passed
          while the session has changed into a long directory path. For this exploit
          to work, the FTP server must be configured to allow write access to the
          file system (either anonymously or in conjunction with a real account)
Microsoft IIS 5.0 FTP Server (Windows 2000 SP4) - Remote Stack Overflow
CVE-2009-3023.author: muts

CVE-2009-3023.description: Microsoft IIS 5.0/6.0 FTP Server (Windows 2000) - Remote Stack Overflow
CVE-2009-3023.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-3023.description: Microsoft IIS FTP Server - NLST Response Overflow (MS09-053) (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3023.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-3976.name: ProFTP 2.9 Banner Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3976.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the ProFTP 2.9
          client that is triggered through an excessively long welcome message.
ProFTP 2.9 - Welcome Message Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3976.author: His0k4

CVE-2009-3068.name: Adobe RoboHelp Server 8 Arbitrary File Upload and Execute
CVE-2009-3068.description:
This module exploits an authentication bypass vulnerability which
          allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary code.
Adobe RoboHelp Server 8 - Arbitrary File Upload / Execution (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3068.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-20009.name: Belkin Bulldog Plus Web Service Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20009.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Belkin Bulldog Plus
          4.0.2 build 1219. When sending a specially crafted http request,
          an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-2265.name: ColdFusion 8.0.1 Arbitrary File Upload and Execute
CVE-2009-2265.description:
This module exploits the Adobe ColdFusion 8.0.1 FCKeditor 'CurrentFolder' File Upload
          and Execute vulnerability.

CVE-2009-0183.name: Free Download Manager Remote Control Server Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0183.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Free Download Manager
          Remote Control 2.5 Build 758. When sending a specially crafted
          Authorization header, an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.
Free Download Manager 2.5/3.0 - Authorisation Stack Buffer Overflow (PoC)
CVE-2009-0183.author: Praveen Darshanam

CVE-2009-0183.description: Free Download Manager 2.5 Build 758 - Remote Control Server Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0183.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4179.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager ovalarm.exe CGI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4179.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.53.
          By sending a specially crafted CGI request to ovalarm.exe, an attacker can execute
          arbitrary code.

          This specific vulnerability is due to a call to "sprintf_new" in the "isWide"
          function within "ovalarm.exe". A stack buffer overflow occurs when processing an
          HTTP request that contains the following.

          1. An "Accept-Language" header longer than 100 bytes
          2. An "OVABverbose" URI variable set to "on", "true" or "1"

          The vulnerability is related to "_WebSession::GetWebLocale()".

          NOTE: This exploit has been tested successfully with a reverse_ord_tcp payload.
HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'ovalarm.exe' CGI Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4179.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4179.description: HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) 7.53 - 'ovalarm.exe' CGI Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4179.author: sinn3r & muts

CVE-2009-4178.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager OvWebHelp.exe CGI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4178.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.50.
          By sending a specially crafted CGI request to OvWebHelp.exe, an attacker may be able to execute
          arbitrary code.
HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'OvWebHelp.exe' CGI Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4178.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4178.description: HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'OvWebHelp.exe' CGI Topic Overflow
CVE-2009-4178.author: S2 Crew

CVE-2009-3849.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager Snmp.exe CGI Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3849.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.50.
          By sending a specially crafted CGI request to Snmp.exe, an attacker may be able to execute
          arbitrary code.
HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'Snmp.exe' CGI Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3849.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-0920.name: HP OpenView Network Node Manager Toolbar.exe CGI Cookie Handling Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-0920.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in HP OpenView Network Node Manager 7.0
          and 7.53.  By sending a CGI request with a specially OvOSLocale cookie to Toolbar.exe, an
          attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.  Please note that this module only works
          against a specific build (i.e. NNM 7.53_01195)
HP OpenView Network Node Manager (OV NNM) - 'Toolbar.exe' CGI Cookie Handling Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0920.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-3999.name: HP Power Manager 'formExportDataLogs' Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3999.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in HP Power Manager's 'formExportDataLogs'.
          By creating a malformed request specifically for the fileName parameter, a stack-based
          buffer overflow occurs due to a long error message (which contains the fileName),
          which may result in arbitrary remote code execution under the context of 'SYSTEM'.
HP Power Manager - 'formExportDataLogs' Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-3999.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2685.name: Hewlett-Packard Power Manager Administration Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2685.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Hewlett-Packard Power Manager 4.2.
          Sending a specially crafted POST request with an overly long Login string, an
          attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.
Hewlett-Packard (HP) Power Manager Administration - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2685.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2685.description: Hewlett-Packard (HP) Power Manager Administration Power Manager Administration - Universal Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2685.author: ryujin

CVE-2009-3711.name: HTTPDX h_handlepeer() Function Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3711.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in HTTPDX HTTP server 1.4. The
          vulnerability is caused due to a boundary error within the "h_handlepeer()" function in http.cpp.
          By sending an overly long HTTP request, an attacker can overrun a buffer and execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-20005.name: InterSystems Cache UtilConfigHome.csp Argument Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20005.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in InterSystems Cache 2009.1.
          By sending a specially crafted GET request, an attacker may be able to execute
          arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-4006.name: Rhinosoft Serv-U Session Cookie Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4006.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in Rhinosoft Serv-U 9.0.0.5.
          Sending a specially crafted POST request with an overly long session cookie
          string, an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.
RhinoSoft Serv-U FTP Server - Session Cookie Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4006.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-4660.name: BigAnt Server 2.52 USV Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4660.description:
This exploits a stack buffer overflow in the BigAnt Messaging Service,
          part of the BigAnt Server product suite. This module was tested
          successfully against version 2.52.

          NOTE: The AntServer service does not restart, you only get one shot.
BigAnt Server 2.50 - GET Remote Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-4660.author: blake

CVE-2009-4660.description: BigAnt Server 2.50 - GET Universal Remote Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-4660.author: hack4love

CVE-2009-2227.name: Bopup Communications Server Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-2227.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Bopup Communications Server 3.2.26.5460.
          By sending a specially crafted packet, an attacker may be
          able to execute arbitrary code.
Bopup Communications Server - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-2227.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-2227.description: Bopup Communications Server 3.2.26.5460 - Remote Buffer Overflow (SEH)
CVE-2009-2227.author: His0k4

CVE-2009-3837.name: Eureka Email 2.2q ERR Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3837.description:
This module exploits a buffer overflow in the Eureka Email 2.2q
          client that is triggered through an excessively long ERR message.

          NOTE: this exploit isn't very reliable. Unfortunately reaching the
          vulnerable code can only be done when manually checking mail (Ctrl-M).
          Checking at startup will not reach the code targeted here.
Eureka Email Client - Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3837.author: Dr_IDE & dookie

CVE-2009-3837.description: Eureka Email Client 2.2q - ERR Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit) (2)
CVE-2009-3837.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-3844.name: HP OmniInet.exe MSG_PROTOCOL Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3844.description:
This module exploits a stack-based buffer overflow in the Hewlett-Packard
          OmniInet NT Service. By sending a specially crafted MSG_PROTOCOL (0x010b)
          packet, a remote attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code with elevated
          privileges.

          This service is installed with HP OpenView Data Protector, HP Application
          Recovery Manager and potentially other products. This exploit has been tested
          against versions 6.1, 6.0, and 5.50 of Data Protector. and versions 6.0 and 6.1
          of Application Recovery Manager.

          NOTE: There are actually two consecutive wcscpy() calls in the program (which
          may be why ZDI considered them two separate issues). However, this module only
          exploits the second one.
HP Application Recovery Manager - 'OmniInet.exe' Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3844.author: EgiX

CVE-2009-0880.name: IBM System Director Agent DLL Injection
CVE-2009-0880.description:
This module abuses the "wmicimsv" service on IBM System Director Agent 5.20.3
        to accomplish arbitrary DLL injection and execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM
        privileges.

        In order to accomplish remote DLL injection it uses a WebDAV service as disclosed
        by kingcope on December 2012. Because of this, the target host must have the
        WebClient service (WebDAV Mini-Redirector) enabled. It is enabled and automatically
        started by default on Windows XP SP3, but disabled by default on Windows 2003 SP2.
IBM System Director Agent 5.20 - CIM Server Privilege Escalation
CVE-2009-0880.author: Bernhard Mueller

CVE-2009-0880.description: IBM System Director Agent - DLL Injection (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-0880.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-0880.description: IBM System Director Agent - Remote System Level
CVE-2009-0880.author: kingcope

CVE-2009-3853.name: IBM Tivoli Storage Manager Express CAD Service Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-3853.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the IBM Tivoli Storage Manager Express CAD Service.
          By sending a "ping" packet containing a long string, an attacker can execute arbitrary code.

          NOTE: the dsmcad.exe service must be in a particular state (CadWaitingStatus = 1) in order
          for the vulnerable code to be reached. This state doesn't appear to be reachable when the
          TSM server is not running. This service does not restart.
IBM Tivoli Storage Manager Express CAD Service - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit) (1)
CVE-2009-3853.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-5109.name: Mini-Stream 3.0.1.1 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-5109.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Mini-Stream 3.0.1.1
          By creating a specially crafted pls file, an attacker may be able
          to execute arbitrary code.
Mini-stream Ripper (Windows XP SP2/SP3) - Local Overflow
CVE-2009-5109.author: dijital1

CVE-2009-5109.description: Mini-stream Ripper 3.0.1.1 - '.pls' Universal Local Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-5109.author: mr_me

CVE-2009-1029.name: POP Peeper v3.4 DATE Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1029.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in POP Peeper v3.4.
          When a specially crafted DATE string is sent to a client,
          an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code. This
          module is based off of krakowlabs code.

CVE-2009-1029.name: POP Peeper v3.4 UIDL Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1029.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in POP Peeper v3.4.
          When a specially crafted UIDL string is sent to a client,
          an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code. This
          module is based off of krakowlabs code.
POP Peeper 3.4.0.0 - Date Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1029.author: Jeremy Brown

CVE-2009-4988.name: SAP Business One License Manager 2005 Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4988.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in the SAP Business One 2005
          License Manager 'NT Naming Service' A and B releases. By sending an
          excessively long string the stack is overwritten enabling arbitrary
          code execution.
SAP Business One 2005-A License Manager - Remote Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-4988.author: Bruk0ut

CVE-2009-4988.description: SAP Business One License Manager 2005 - Remote Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-4988.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-20007.name: Talkative IRC v0.4.4.16 Response Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-20007.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Talkative IRC v0.4.4.16.
          When a specially crafted response string is sent to a client,
          an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-1979.name: Oracle 10gR2 TNS Listener AUTH_SESSKEY Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1979.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Oracle. When
          sending a specially crafted packet containing a long AUTH_SESSKEY value
          to the TNS service, an attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2009-1350.name: Novell NetIdentity Agent XTIERRPCPIPE Named Pipe Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1350.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Novell's NetIdentity Agent. When sending
          a specially crafted string to the 'XTIERRPCPIPE' named pipe, an attacker may be
          able to execute arbitrary code. The success of this module is much greater once the
          service has been restarted.
Novell NetIdentity Agent - XTIERRPCPIPE Named Pipe Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1350.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-1394.name: Timbuktu PlughNTCommand Named Pipe Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1394.description:
This module exploits a stack based buffer overflow in Timbuktu Pro version <= 8.6.6
          in a pretty novel way.

          This exploit requires two connections. The first connection is used to leak stack data
          using the buffer overflow to overwrite the nNumberOfBytesToWrite argument. By supplying
          a large value for this argument it is possible to cause Timbuktu to reply to the initial
          request with leaked stack data. Using this data allows for reliable exploitation of the
          buffer overflow vulnerability.

          Props to Infamous41d for helping in finding this exploitation path.

          The second connection utilizes the data from the data leak to accurately exploit
          the stack based buffer overflow vulnerability.

          TODO:
          hdm suggested using meterpreter's migration capability and restarting the process
          for multishot exploitation.
Timbuktu 8.6.6 - PlughNTCommand Named Pipe Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)
CVE-2009-1394.author: Metasploit

CVE-2009-1943.name: SafeNet SoftRemote IKE Service Buffer Overflow
CVE-2009-1943.description:
This module exploits a stack buffer overflow in Safenet SoftRemote IKE IreIKE.exe
          service. When sending a specially crafted udp packet to port 62514 an
          attacker may be able to execute arbitrary code. This module has
          been tested with Juniper NetScreen-Remote 10.8.0 (Build 20) using
          windows/meterpreter/reverse_ord_tcp payloads.
SafeNet SoftRemote - IKE Service Buffer Overflow (Metasploit)

info.Name: AWStats < 6.95 - Open Redirect
info.Description: An open redirect vulnerability in awredir.pl in AWStats < 6.95 allows remote attackers to redirect users to arbitrary web sites and conduct phishing attacks via unspecified vectors.

info.Name: FileZilla Server < 0.9.31 - SSL/TLS Packet Overflow DoS
info.Description: FileZilla Server versions prior to 0.9.31 contain a buffer overflow vulnerability related to SSL/TLS packet handling. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service through unspecified vectors involving SSL/TLS packets.
